name: Strawberry Fields REIT, Inc.
description: Strawberry Fields REIT, Inc. is a self-administered real estate investment trust that specializes in the ownership, acquisition, development, and leasing of skilled nursing and healthcare-related properties. Headquartered in South Bend, Indiana, the company focuses on assembling a significant network of high-quality facilities across America's heartland. By partnering with dedicated healthcare operators who prioritize exceptional care, Strawberry Fields REIT aims to provide stable, long-term value while addressing the growing demand for elder care services as the nation's population ages.
